title: paeonia foemina proles humilis
intro: Paeonia foemina proles humilis, also known as the lowly or dwarf form of the female peony, is a plant species in the genus Paeonia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to calm the mind and body, and ease symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Paeonia foemina proles humilis include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to relieve menstrual cramps, and its sedative effects, which can promote relaxation and improve sleep quality. Paeonia foemina proles humilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
